post_save.description: What would you like to do next?

shared.name: Name
shared.title: Title
shared.label: Label
shared.star_interest_aria: Set interest level to {{stars}} of 5 stars

agent.title: Assistant
agent.description: Send a prompt to interact with the agent. In this prototype, replies are simulated in the browser.
agent.empty_thread: No messages yet. Type below and send to start.

auth.recover_desc: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
auth.recover_success: If an account exists for this email, you'll receive reset instructions shortly.
auth.recover_footer_hint: The email may take a few minutes. Check your spam folder too.
auth.recover_error_generic: Could not send the request. Please try again in a moment.
auth.recover_error_network: Could not connect. Check your network and that the API is reachable (base URL in VITE_API_BASE_URL).
auth.login_subtitle: Sign in with Google or email
auth.network_error: Could not reach the API. Check your network and VITE_API_BASE_URL.
auth.register_subtitle: Sign up with Google or email
auth.account_create_failed: Could not create your account. Please try again.
auth.reset_new_desc: Choose a new password for your account.
auth.reset_token_invalid_notice: This link does not include a valid token.
auth.reset_token_missing_error: Invalid or incomplete link. Request a new password reset email.
auth.reset_footer: The link expires after a few hours. If you need another, use
auth.reset_connect_error: Could not connect. Check your network and that the API is reachable (base URL in VITE_API_BASE_URL).
auth.legal_prefix: By continuing, you agree to our
auth.accept_register_label: I have read and agree to the Terms of Use and Privacy Policy linked below.
auth.accept_policy_required: You must accept the Terms of Use and Privacy Policy to create an account.
auth.accept_policy_hint: Read the legal links below the card, then check this box to continue.

home.title: Hireest
home.subtitle: Example pages with shadcn: login and dashboard with sidebar.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.chart_trend_desc: Opportunities created per week (last 4 weeks), by status
dashboard.top_jobs_desc: Up to {{limit}} roles: highest interest first; ties by most recently updated.
dashboard.empty_table: No opportunities yet. Add some under Opportunities.

opportunities.title: Opportunities
opportunities.kanban_empty_statuses_intro: No opportunity statuses yet. Create a status to add Kanban columns (pipeline stages). You can also add one from an opportunity form (Opportunity status → +).
opportunities.empty_list: No opportunities yet. Add one to get started.
opportunities.delete_desc: This removes the opportunity from your list. You can add it again later.
opportunities.form_lists_error: Could not load form data (companies, roles, or statuses).
opportunities.card_desc_new: Add a job opportunity to your tracker.
opportunities.dialog_desc_create: Add an opportunity quickly — same fields as the full opportunity form.
opportunities.dialog_desc_edit: Update this opening — same fields as the full opportunity form.
opportunities.dialog_not_found_desc: The record may have been removed. Close and try again.
opportunities.quick_add_company_desc: Create this company so you can select it in the form.
opportunities.quick_add_role_desc: Create this role so you can select it in the form.
opportunities.quick_add_status_desc: Create this status so you can select it in the form.
opportunities.form_company_empty_hint: Use + to create a company and select it here.
opportunities.form_role_empty_hint: Use + to create a role and select it here.
opportunities.form_url_optional_hint: Optional. Link to the vacancy posting or company page.
opportunities.form_hourly_hint: Optional. Gross pay per hour in your main currency (e.g. USD).
opportunities.form_salary_hint: Optional. Total annual compensation in the same currency.
opportunities.form_status_empty_hint: Use + to create a pipeline status and select it here.

opportunity_statuses.title: Opportunity statuses
opportunity_statuses.description: Configure pipeline stages — each status appears as a column on the Kanban board
opportunity_statuses.empty: No statuses. Add your first stage.
opportunity_statuses.delete_desc: Opportunities in this column move to another status. Custom Kanban columns are not removed.

opportunity_status.card_desc_edit: Update the label and badge style. The internal id stays the same so existing opportunities remain linked.
opportunity_status.card_desc_new: Add a stage to your pipeline. It becomes a column on the Kanban board.
opportunity_status.placeholder_description: What does this stage mean? e.g. CV sent, waiting for recruiter reply.

companies.title: Companies
companies.description: Companies you are tracking for opportunities
companies.empty: No companies yet. Add one to get started.
companies.delete_desc: This removes the company from your list.

company.card_desc_new: Add a company you want to track.

roles.title: Roles
roles.description: Job roles you are interested in
roles.empty: No roles yet. Add one to get started.
roles.delete_desc: This removes the role from your list.

role.card_desc_new: Add a job role you care about.
role.name_taken: You already have a role with this name (same spelling, ignoring uppercase and lowercase).

skills.title: Skills
skills.description: Technical skills relevant to your job search
skills.empty: No skills yet. Add one to get started.
skills.delete_desc: This removes the skill from your list.

skill.card_desc_new: Add a skill to your profile list.

languages.title: Languages
languages.description: Languages you speak — used like skills and roles across the app
languages.empty: No languages yet. Add one to get started.
languages.delete_desc: This removes the language from your list.

language.card_desc_edit: Update this spoken language and proficiency level.
language.card_desc_new: Add a language you speak for your profile.

links.title: Links
links.description: Bookmarks and URLs you use alongside your search
links.empty: No links yet. Add one to get started.
links.delete_desc: This removes the link from your list.

reference_link.card_desc_new: Save a title and URL for quick access from your sidebar area.

certifications.title: Certifications
certifications.empty: No certifications yet. Add one to get started.
certifications.delete_desc: This removes the certification from your list.

certification.card_desc_new: Add a certification or license you hold.

educations.title: Education
educations.empty: No education entries yet. Add one to get started.
educations.delete_desc: This removes the entry from your list.

education.card_desc_new: Add a degree or program you completed.

work_experience.list_description: Roles and employers in your career history
work_experience.empty: No work experience yet. Add one to get started.
work_experience.delete_desc: This removes the entry from your list.
work_experience.card_desc_edit: Update this position in your history.
work_experience.card_desc_new: Add a role or employer you want on your CV.
work_experience.responsibilities_placeholder: Responsibilities, scope, or achievements for this role…
work_experience.skills_fieldset_desc: Filter and select skills for this experience. Selected: {{count}}.
work_experience.quick_add_dialog_desc: Create the record so you can link it to this resume.
work_experience.quick_add_description_placeholder: Optional — responsibilities or achievements in this role

resumes.title: Resumes
resumes.description: Saved CV versions — browse as cards and open one to edit.
resumes.empty_linkedin_body: Create a new resume or import a PDF. For LinkedIn: on your profile, open More at the top and save or download your profile as PDF, then use Import PDF and upload the file.
resumes.delete_desc: This removes the saved resume from your list.

resume.not_found_body: This resume does not exist or you no longer have access to it.
resume.card_desc_edit: Update this saved resume. Set the output language, link one role, and attach any experiences, certifications, education rows, and skills.
resume.card_desc_new: Create a resume: choose the output language first, then pick the target role and attach supporting records.
resume.preferred_language_hint: Language used when this resume is generated or exported (English, Portuguese — Brazil, or Spanish). Choose this before filling in the rest of the form.
resume.description_placeholder: Short summary, target roles, or notes for this version.
resume.role_hint_empty: Use + to create a role and select it here.
resume.role_hint_required: Select a role to enable saving.
resume.work_desc: Experiences to include on this resume.
resume.work_hint: Use + to create an experience and select it here.
resume.cert_hint: Use + to create a certification and select it here.
resume.edu_hint: Use + to create an education entry and select it here.
resume.skills_hint: Use + to create a skill and select it here.
resume.we_empty_skills_hint: Use + to create a skill and check it here.
resume.quick_add_skill_desc: Create this skill so you can link it to this resume.
resume.quick_add_cert_desc: Create this certification so you can link it to this resume.
resume.quick_add_edu_desc: Create this education entry so you can link it to this resume.

compile_markdown.title: Generate ATS Resume
compile_markdown.desc_auto_before: Generating an ATS-optimised markdown resume for
compile_markdown.desc_manual_before: Generate an ATS-optimised markdown resume from the data linked to
compile_markdown.ready_body: The AI will compile all linked work experiences, education, certifications, and skills into an ATS-optimised markdown document.
compile_markdown.error_fallback: Could not generate the resume. Please try again.

pdf_import.title: Import resume from PDF
pdf_import.linkedin_hint: A PDF exported from your own LinkedIn profile (More › save profile to PDF — wording may vary) works great here.
pdf_import.preferred_lang_hint: Choose this first: it sets the locale for the resume we create from your PDF.
pdf_import.role_attached_hint: Imported content is attached to this role, like a manually created resume.
pdf_import.drop_zone_aria: Choose PDF file or drop a PDF here
pdf_import.drop_main: Drag and drop a PDF here
pdf_import.drop_sub: Or click to browse your files.

ai_description.title: AI description assistant
ai_description.description: Generate improves the preview text using your resume language, linked role, and linked profile data as context—keep editing the preview, then Apply to copy it into your resume description.
ai_description.draft_placeholder: Current description loads here. Generate replaces this text.
ai_description.preview_hint: You can edit the preview before applying.

my_data.card_description: View and update the information shown in the account menu in the sidebar. Data is loaded from your account and saved to the server.
my_data.preferred_language_hint: Used for UI copy and defaults in the app (not the spoken languages list).
my_data.placeholder_new_key: New key to replace the saved one
my_data.openai_desc: Stored on your account for AI resume features (import PDF, generate text, compile markdown). The key is never shown again after saving.
my_data.avatar_hint: Optional. If empty, initials from your name are used.
my_data.form_error_fallback: Could not save your profile. Try again.
my_data.age_invalid: Age must be a whole number between 0 and 150, or leave blank.

registration_onboarding.step1_description: A quick overview of the main areas of the app.
registration_onboarding.feature_opportunities: Track job opportunities on a Kanban board with statuses and companies.
registration_onboarding.feature_resumes: Build and manage resumes, including PDF import powered by AI.
registration_onboarding.feature_companies: Organize companies and roles you are targeting.
registration_onboarding.feature_roles: Define roles (job titles) and link them to resumes and opportunities.
registration_onboarding.feature_ai: Use your own OpenAI API key for AI-assisted resume import and text features.
registration_onboarding.step2_description: Add resume-related details and your interface language. Name and email from signup can be changed anytime under My data.
registration_onboarding.step2_resume_banner: The fields below (bio, contact, and personal details) are used to pre-fill and enrich your resumes. They are optional unless marked required — you can skip them and fill them in later under My data.
registration_onboarding.step3_description: Some features call OpenAI using your key (PDF resume import, AI-assisted text, Markdown compilation). The key is stored on your account and is never shown again after saving.
registration_onboarding.openai_required: Enter your OpenAI API secret key to continue.
registration_onboarding.profile_not_ready: Profile is still loading. Wait a moment and try again.
registration_onboarding.openai_save_error: Could not save your API key. Check the value and try again.
registration_onboarding.openai_field_hint: Create a key in your OpenAI account and paste it here.
registration_onboarding.step4_description: Create a role (for example “Senior Frontend Engineer”) to attach to resumes and opportunities.
registration_onboarding.step5_hint: Next, add a resume — you can import from PDF or start from scratch.
